# {{ title }}

> {{ description }}

HAXcms is a file-based CMS where authored content and metadata are stored as portable files.
The canonical structure is expressed in `site.json` using JSON Outline Schema (`id`, `parent`, `order`, `slug`, `location`, and `metadata`).
Use HAX CLI and ecosystem tooling to keep human-authored pages and machine-readable outputs synchronized.
Managed files (feeds, search indexes, manifests, and this `llms.txt`) are generated artifacts and should be rebuilt by tooling.

## Core resources

- [site.json]({{ basePath }}site.json): Canonical site manifest and navigation tree in JSON Outline Schema format.
- [llms.txt]({{ basePath }}llms.txt): LLM-oriented guide to this site and its machine-readable resources.

## Optional

- [Search index]({{ basePath }}lunrSearchIndex.json): Lunr corpus for quick full-text retrieval.
- [RSS feed]({{ basePath }}rss.xml): Site updates in RSS format.
- [Atom feed]({{ basePath }}atom.xml): Site updates in Atom format.
- [Sitemap]({{ basePath }}sitemap.xml): URL-level discovery map for the published site.
